results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end

summary_extracted.vote: 8-4 split (unusual dissent, last 4 dissents in Oct 1992)
summary_extracted.dissent_details: 3 wanted to remove future cut language; 1 (Miran) wanted immediate cut
summary_extracted.inflation_note: Elevated, partly reflecting recent increase in global energy prices
summary_extracted.leadership: Warsh nomination advancing, may replace Powell as Chair
